name: Fractal Descent
description: An endless cinematic fall INTO a Mandelbox cathedral-world — recursive chambers opening into deeper chambers. The Rrrola/Fragmentarium Mandelbox distance estimator (ported, FA #73) with a self-similar scale descent toward a detailed boundary point; the music's energy drives how fast you fall and a bass swell opens the fold into a larger chamber. Jewel stained-glass palette with three materials (shaded jewelled stone, thin-film iridescent fold rims, emissive deep-recess votives). MetalFX Temporal anti-aliasing (MFX.1) resolves the fractal's sub-pixel detail, which aliases badly without it (BUG-071).
author: Matt
